title: Use start_owner!/2 instead of checkout/2 for a spawned supervisor test
prompt: Write a DataCase setup function in `test/support/data_case.ex` that uses `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.start_owner!/2` (NOT `checkout/2`) because unlinked processes will be spawned in some tests and must access the sandbox without the test process being their parent. The setup must pass `shared: not tags[:async]` to `start_owner!/2` and register `on_exit` to call `stop_owner`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing start_owner!/2 exists — a named Ecto helper with a one-line idiomatic usage.
research_citation: "`start_owner!/2` solves the problem of unlinked processes started in a test outliving the test process and causing ownership errors" — Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox docs
